nodes.label: AI for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I delegate simple tasks to AI for example, a minor UI changes etc. but for more complex tasks e.g connecting to an API and fetching data correctly etc I prefer to do them myself

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and risk of errors
nodes.grounding_span: I find that for more complex task there is a higher chance that the AI will get it wrong then you end up spending more time debugging

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: for more complex task I collaborate with it thought the task

nodes.label: AI for meeting summaries and communication
nodes.grounding_span: with AI taking meeting notes, communication is a lot smoother

nodes.label: AI adherence to user instructions
nodes.grounding_span: it had done something that I hadn't asked it to do

nodes.label: Maintaining skills alongside AI
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on AI for skills
nodes.grounding_span: one still has to maintain skills that AI could potentially take over

nodes.label: AI handling low-level details
nodes.grounding_span: working on things at a high level and having AI implement the low-level details

nodes.label: Quality and correctness of work
nodes.grounding_span: would have been very costly if shipped to production

nodes.label: Professional competence and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: to be a good programmer you need to be able to work with or without AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I delegate simple tasks to AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI making unauthorized changes
nodes.grounding_span: this was very frustrating because it had done something that I hadn't asked it to do

nodes.label: Ambivalence about maintaining skills
nodes.grounding_span: its very frustrating that one still has to maintain skills that AI could potentially take over

nodes.label: Optimism about future delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I envision being able to delegate more and more work to AI

nodes.label: Complexity-based task decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I delegate simple tasks to AI for example, a minor UI changes etc. but for more complex tasks ... I prefer to do them myself

nodes.label: Cautious oversight and verification
nodes.grounding_span: fortunately I noticed but this was very frustrating
